creator: mjacob@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I could not reproduce the hang. I restored over the net the entire contents 
of a /usr partition. 

It's just possible that if you restore into a live /usr partitition that 
there might be issues, but basically you shouldn't be doing that. If you 
have separate root and usr partiations, restore your usr partition to another 
directory and then remount it later as /usr.
